mapper.insert: insert into material ( session_id, file_name, file_path, file_type, parse_status, summary, keywords, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{sessionId}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileType}, #{parseStatus}, #{summary}, #{keywords}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: select id, session_id, file_name, file_path, file_type, parse_status, summary, keywords, create_time, update_time from material where id = #{id}
select id, session_id, file_name, file_path, file_type, parse_status, summary, keywords, create_time, update_time from material where session_id = #{sessionId} order by create_time asc
mapper.update: update material set parse_status = #{status}, summary = #{summary}, keywords = #{keywords}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
